vampire_001.title: The Organic Blood Bag
vampire_001.body: A blood supply has vanished. Someone stocked up without permission.

vampire_002.title: Rumor of Silver Bullets
vampire_002.body: A human stares at you like they know your name and your coffin.

vampire_003.title: The Bloodline Feud
vampire_003.body: Two clan bloodlines are fighting over control of a hideout. Tension rises and everyone is waiting for your ruling.

vampire_004.title: Secret Influencers
vampire_004.body: The vampire secret is growing. It strokes egos and attracts trouble.

vampire_005.title: The Reflectionless Photo
vampire_005.body: A human posts a photo where you have no reflection. The picture spreads fast.

vampire_006.title: The Blood Brewery
vampire_006.body: The price of blood is rising, even here.

vampire_007.title: The Crypt Awakens
vampire_007.body: A crack in the crypt lets an icy breath through.

vampire_008.title: The Vampire Denture
vampire_008.body: A small immortal problem: one ridiculous detail can ruin an entire night.

vampire_009.title: The Cold Blood Relic
vampire_009.body: A relic promises endless blood. Everyone wants it, especially the hunters.

choices.C: Offer it to the hunters to trap them

vampire_010.title: The Late Delivery
vampire_010.body: The refrigerated truck disappeared with three crates. The blood is warming up and the rumors are growing.

vampire_011.title: The Masquerade Ball
vampire_011.body: An upscale gala invites important figures. Perfect for feeding the clan, perfect for getting spotted.

vampire_012.title: The Sleepless Priest
vampire_012.body: A priest no longer sleeps. He blesses the tap water out of spite.

vampire_013.title: The Alley Camera
vampire_013.body: A street camera caught you in a full sprint. In the footage, you are moving far too fast.

vampire_014.title: The Hunt for the Fake Vampire
vampire_014.body: An imitator is pretending to be you. He bites random people and leaves evidence behind.

choices.C: Hand him over to the hunters

vampire_015.title: The Neighborhood Pact
vampire_015.body: The local gangs want a deal. Protection in exchange for silence.

vampire_016.title: Vegan Blood
vampire_016.body: Humans are selling supposedly ethical blood. It smells like a scam and the police.

vampire_017.title: The Missing Coffin
vampire_017.body: Your backup coffin has disappeared. Someone mistook it for a vintage trunk.

vampire_018.title: The Reinforced Patrol
vampire_018.body: The police are increasing night patrols. The hunters are hiding behind the badge.

vampire_019.title: The Union Meeting
vampire_019.body: The lower vampires want better hunting conditions. They are even talking about a strike.

vampire_020.title: The Crying Statue
vampire_020.body: A statue in the crypt is oozing blood. The secret loves it, the clan is panicking.

vampire_021.title: The Young Bat
vampire_021.body: A young vampire transforms too early. He clings to the ceiling and screams.

vampire_022.title: The Polite Hunter
vampire_022.body: A hunter asks for a meeting. He smiles too much. He knows something.

vampire_023.title: The Secret Windfall
vampire_023.body: The secret offers huge donations. It smells like manipulation, but it is tempting.

vampire_024.title: The Forbidden Banquet
vampire_024.body: One bloodline proposes a banquet. The menu is suspicious, and so is the plan.

choices.C: Join in to check it yourself

vampire_025.title: The Smell of Garlic
vampire_025.body: Someone is perfuming the whole street with garlic. It is becoming a local sport.

vampire_026.title: The Famous Huntress
vampire_026.body: A huntress goes on TV. She points to your city on a map.

vampire_027.title: The Cleanup Contract
vampire_027.body: A company offers to clean up the evidence. Too professional to be honest.

vampire_028.title: The Gothic Club
vampire_028.body: A gothic club wants to crown you vampire of the month. You do not like flashes.

vampire_029.title: The Tainted Blood
vampire_029.body: Several vampires fall sick. The latest batch is bad.

vampire_030.title: The Coded Message
vampire_030.body: A human leaves you a coded note. It says they know your true name.

vampire_031.title: The Moon's Gift
vampire_031.body: The full moon makes the clan nervous. Mistakes are multiplying.

vampire_032.title: The Night Radio
vampire_032.body: A local radio station reads messages meant for you. Someone is challenging you live on air.

vampire_033.title: The Festival of Lights
vampire_033.body: The city installs floodlights everywhere. Great atmosphere, bad for you.

vampire_034.title: The Hospital Pact
vampire_034.body: A hospital director offers you a deal. He wants your protection.

choices.C: Take the supply without a deal

vampire_035.title: The App Hunt
vampire_035.body: A dating app is targeting your hunting grounds. The traps have gone modern.

vampire_036.title: The New Accountant
vampire_036.body: A human accountant is handling your finances. He asks too many questions.

vampire_037.title: The Open Grave
vampire_037.body: A grave is open in your cemetery. Someone is looking for an ancient key.

choices.A: Close it and set a trap

vampire_038.title: The Rigged Mirror
vampire_038.body: An artisan is selling mirrors that reflect you. The clan is jealous.

vampire_039.title: The Blessed Rain
vampire_039.body: It is raining water that burns a little. Someone blessed the clouds, yes.

vampire_040.title: The Curious Cab Driver
vampire_040.body: A cab driver says he already saw you die. He wants a story, or he talks.

vampire_041.title: The Blood Ransom
vampire_041.body: A gang captures one of your clan members. They demand blood and secrets.

vampire_042.title: The Sealed Library
vampire_042.body: A library bans access to one room. The secret says it sings at night.

vampire_043.title: The Too Kind Neighbor
vampire_043.body: Your neighbor brings cakes every night. Way too much garlic, strangely enough.

vampire_044.title: The Ash Broom
vampire_044.body: A servant spills sacred ashes everywhere. It makes your skin itch.

vampire_045.title: The Red Comet
vampire_045.body: The sky turns red for one night. The secret announces the end, and the hunters prepare.

vampire_046.title: The Claw on the Door
vampire_046.body: Someone scratches your crypt door. The message is clear: you have been found.

vampire_047.title: The Promise of Immortality
vampire_047.body: A wealthy human wants to become a vampire. He pays, insists, and has a team.

vampire_048.title: Karaoke Night
vampire_048.body: The clan wants a karaoke night for bonding. Terrible idea, but funny.

vampire_049.title: The Drone Above
vampire_049.body: A drone flies over your hideout every night. It always comes back.

vampire_050.title: The Blood Exchange
vampire_050.body: Traffickers are fixing prices. They want a tax on your territory.

vampire_051.title: The Night Train
vampire_051.body: A night train arrives empty. The seats are warm. Very warm.

choices.C: Call the hunters to test it

vampire_052.title: The Stolen Relic
vampire_052.body: The cold blood relic has been stolen. The culprit left a symbol of the secret.

vampire_053.title: The Wolves' Pact
vampire_053.body: A pack offers a truce. They want clear borders.

vampire_054.title: The Forbidden Song
vampire_054.body: A song is about you. Whenever it plays, dogs howl.

choices.C: Turn the trend to your advantage

vampire_055.title: The Cracked Cup
vampire_055.body: Your ritual cup is cracked. Without it, the clan doubts you.

choices.B: Replace it with a new one
choices.C: Turn the crack into a symbol

vampire_056.title: The Scent of Holiness
vampire_056.body: A shop is selling a perfume that repels vampires. Instant success.

vampire_057.title: The Blood Oath
vampire_057.body: An elder demands a public oath. He wants to test your loyalty.

vampire_058.title: The Dog That Sees Everything
vampire_058.body: A dog stares at you and growls. Humans say it sees monsters.

vampire_059.title: The Power Outage
vampire_059.body: A total blackout hits the city. The night becomes perfect, too perfect.

vampire_060.title: The Police Station
vampire_060.body: Someone leaves a blood bag in front of the police station. A direct provocation.

vampire_061.title: The Doctors' Pact
vampire_061.body: Doctors want to study your blood. They promise secrecy and progress.

choices.C: Use them for a fake cure

vampire_062.title: The Novice's Escape
vampire_062.body: A novice panicked and fled into the city. He is leaving traces everywhere.

vampire_063.title: The Secret's Trial
vampire_063.body: The secret wants to judge a human who insulted you. They ask for your blessing.

vampire_064.title: The Flooded Cellar
vampire_064.body: Your secret cellar is flooded. The coffins are floating around. Ridiculous atmosphere.

choices.C: Turn it into a secret attraction

vampire_065.title: The Fake Sun
vampire_065.body: A company is installing extremely powerful lights. It feels like a fake sun.

vampire_066.title: The Clan's Debt
vampire_066.body: The clan owes a debt to a human criminal. He wants payment now.

vampire_067.title: The Artists' Pact
vampire_067.body: Artists want to paint your legend on the walls. It draws attention.

choices.C: Use the art to hide signs

vampire_068.title: Rumor Hunt
vampire_068.body: A local forum is collecting proof. The posts keep piling up.

vampire_069.title: The Night Market
vampire_069.body: A night market sells talismans. Some of them work, unfortunately.

vampire_070.title: The Elders' Duel
vampire_070.body: Two elders challenge each other. They want an old-fashioned duel, which means bloody.

vampire_071.title: The Blurry Photo
vampire_071.body: A blurry photo shows you behind a curtain. It shows just enough to cause panic.

vampire_072.title: The Poisoned Gift
vampire_072.body: A package arrives with a ribbon. Inside is an object that smells blessed.

vampire_073.title: The Secret Wedding
vampire_073.body: The secret is organizing a night wedding. They want you as the witness.

vampire_074.title: The Soft Mutiny
vampire_074.body: Some vampires are demanding more blood for the weak. They call it justice.

vampire_075.title: The Secret Tunnel
vampire_075.body: A tunnel under the crypt leads to an exit. Someone has already used it.

vampire_076.title: The Rain of Ash
vampire_076.body: A chimney rains ash over the city. Humans think it is a sign.

vampire_077.title: The Cemetery Guard
vampire_077.body: The cemetery keeper knows you. He wants pay and respect.

vampire_078.title: The Drink That's Too Good
vampire_078.body: The secret invents a blood drink. Everyone wants it, even the humans.

choices.B: Sell it on the black market

vampire_079.title: The Hackers' Pact
vampire_079.body: Hackers offer to clean up the internet. They want payment in blood.

vampire_080.title: The Midnight Bell
vampire_080.body: A bell rings at midnight for no reason. At each chime, the hunters move.

vampire_081.title: The New Symbol
vampire_081.body: An unknown symbol appears on your walls. Not clan, not secret. Something else.

choices.C: Make it look like a secret ritual

vampire_082.title: The Forbidden Hunt
vampire_082.body: A sacred territory is off-limits for hunting. But hunger is winning.

choices.C: Offer a trade to the guardian

vampire_083.title: The Hunters' Banquet
vampire_083.body: The hunters are holding a banquet. They invited a traitor from the clan.

vampire_084.title: The Iron Crown
vampire_084.body: You are offered an ancient crown. It promises authority, and it comes at a cost.

vampire_085.title: The Perfect Night
vampire_085.body: Everything is calm. Too calm. Even the rats are silent. An attack is coming.

vampire_086.title: The Talking Fridge
vampire_086.body: The fridge displays a message on its own. The clan panics. You hate surprises.

vampire_087.title: The Driver Who's Too Nice
vampire_087.body: He tells everyone you never sleep. Nice of him. Also very dangerous.

choices.A: Keep him but rein him in

vampire_088.title: The Cellar Crawl
vampire_088.body: Humans are going out in groups. Easy to spot, harder to approach without leaving evidence.

vampire_089.title: The Museum Guard
vampire_089.body: He took a photo and sent it to a collector friend. Collectors often end up as hunters.

choices.B: Distract him with a false lead

vampire_090.title: The Servants' Strike
vampire_090.body: The servants have demands. Your palace suddenly looks like a company.

vampire_091.title: The Garlic Necklace
vampire_091.body: Humans think it is funny. You find it aggressive. And the smell follows you like an insult.

vampire_092.title: The Missing Key
vampire_092.body: The key to the ancient protections is gone. Someone knew where it was.

vampire_093.title: The Notary Appointment
vampire_093.body: The notary likes details too much. Details always threaten the secret.

vampire_094.title: The Public Bite
vampire_094.body: He says he got carried away by the mood. The mood is now an investigation.

choices.B: Punish the youngster in front of everyone

vampire_095.title: The Strange-Tasting Blood
vampire_095.body: Even immortals refuse this blood. So the problem is serious.

vampire_096.title: The Fake Documentary
vampire_096.body: It talks about tunnels and disappearances. The details are false, but not the idea.

vampire_097.title: The Scent of Sunlight
vampire_097.body: Humans smear it on happily. You can feel your immortality losing some comfort.

choices.B: Ban its use near the lair

vampire_098.title: The Oath Ring
vampire_098.body: This ring never returns without reason. It announces a promise, or a threat. Sometimes both.

vampire_099.title: The Gardener Neighbor
vampire_099.body: He is kind, smiling, and obsessed with little shovels. Everything you hate right now.

vampire_100.title: Radio Silence
vampire_100.body: When a vampire disappears, it is never random. Either a trap, or a betrayal. Or both.

choices.C: Assume the worst and strike back

vampire_101.title: The Antiques Market
vampire_101.body: The seller says it came from a cellar. Of course. Cellars always make convenient excuses.

vampire_102.title: The Secret Wants a Logo
vampire_102.body: They want a visible identity. You mostly want them to stay invisible.

vampire_103.title: The Sleepless Cameraman
vampire_103.body: He loves shadows, alleys, silhouettes. He is one step away from filming the wrong silhouette.

vampire_104.title: The Clan's New Code
vampire_104.body: The meeting lasts forever. Which is ironic, because you literally have forever.

vampire_105.title: The Neighborhood Complaint
vampire_105.body: A petition is circulating. The humans are afraid. All eyes turn to you.

vampire_106.title: The Forgotten Phone
vampire_106.body: The phone contains photos and messages. A real threat to the secret.

vampire_107.title: The Punctured Blood Bag
vampire_107.body: A red trail like a thread through a maze. Except your maze has fangs.

vampire_108.title: The Surprise Visit
vampire_108.body: He smiles like a king on tour. He looks at your lair as if it already belongs to him.

vampire_109.title: The Wounded Hunter
vampire_109.body: He is bleeding, shaking, but still hateful. A wounded animal bites harder.

vampire_110.title: The Broken Lock
vampire_110.body: An open door is an invitation. And you do not like guests.

vampire_111.title: The Scent of Lies
vampire_111.body: Lies have a smell. You know it too well. The question is why he is lying now.

choices.C: Let him talk and trap him

vampire_112.title: The Cure Rumor
vampire_112.body: A cure makes some dream and others panic. The hunters are already watching.

vampire_113.title: The Night Bus
vampire_113.body: Every night, windows full of eyes. Eyes keep watching. One day, they will see.

vampire_114.title: The Overly Talkative Waiter
vampire_114.body: He says you are mysterious. He imitates the way you walk. He adds details. Details are knives.

vampire_115.title: The Anonymous Package
vampire_115.body: The package does not smell human. It smells ancient. And it reached you far too easily.

vampire_116.title: The Hunters' Meeting
vampire_116.body: They are not even hiding. When an enemy grows confident, they are planning something.

vampire_117.title: The Night Musician
vampire_117.body: He plays too well. As if he is trying to lure someone. The question is who.

vampire_118.title: The Lost Map
vampire_118.body: The loyalist says he found it by chance. Chance has a sense of humor, but you do not.

vampire_119.title: The Rare Blood
vampire_119.body: The clan is fighting like children. Except children do not have fangs and century-old grudges.

vampire_120.title: The Forbidden Room
vampire_120.body: He is pale, even for a vampire. He says he heard breathing behind the wall.

vampire_121.title: The Security Contract
vampire_121.body: More cameras mean more evidence. But controlling the cameras means controlling the story.

vampire_122.title: The Scent of Roses
vampire_122.body: You have to stay still all day in a transport coffin. That is a real test by itself.

vampire_123.title: The Obsessed Painter
vampire_123.body: He says your gaze is unique. He wants to paint you in the light. Bad idea.

choices.C: Drive him out of the neighborhood

vampire_124.title: The Secret's Debt
vampire_124.body: They helped once. Now they think they are untouchable.

vampire_125.title: The Human Bodyguard
vampire_125.body: He is loyal, competent, and too curious. Three qualities that end badly together.

vampire_126.title: The Lamp That's Too Bright
vampire_126.body: A simple lamp changes everything. Humans love light. You endure it.

vampire_127.title: The Creaking Chest
vampire_127.body: The chest never used to make noise. Now it groans. And archives taste like secrets.

vampire_128.title: The Chase
vampire_128.body: The engine roars, the headlights stick to you, and your calm starts cracking. Someone wants to force you into a mistake.

choices.C: Return to the lair by a detour

vampire_129.title: The Clan Cafeteria
vampire_129.body: They want order and comfort. You want secrecy and control.

vampire_130.title: The Sermon of Fear
vampire_130.body: The louder he shouts, the more people listen. The more they listen, the more bad ears arrive.

choices.C: Use his fear as a smokescreen

vampire_131.title: The Rival's Plan
vampire_131.body: He is not striking you, he is surrounding you. Slower, but crueler.

vampire_132.title: The Acid Rain
vampire_132.body: It is not sunlight. It is something else. And something else usually means a trap.

vampire_133.title: The Pharmacy Pact
vampire_133.body: Pharmacies want to tie your image to their campaign. They want photos, interviews, and a public appearance.

vampire_134.title: The Vegetarian Vampire
vampire_134.body: He talks about morals and peace. The elders call it weakness. You call it stability.

vampire_135.title: The Silver Padlock
vampire_135.body: Silver stings just looking at it. Someone wanted to slow you down, not kill you. Not yet.

vampire_136.title: The Water Leak
vampire_136.body: Water brings in workers. Workers ask too many questions.

vampire_137.title: The Last Train
vampire_137.body: A simple schedule change affects hunting, travel, timing. And you live by timing.

vampire_138.title: The Broken Window
vampire_138.body: A broken window is an entrance. Or a message. And you like neither.

vampire_139.title: The Intern in a Lab Coat
vampire_139.body: He is young, sharp, and motivated. The worst kind of person when you want to stay hidden.

vampire_140.title: The Perfumed Letter
vampire_140.body: That scent is not human. It reminds you of a time when you were less powerful. Which means more cautious.

vampire_141.title: The Carnival Mask
vampire_141.body: For once, you can walk without drawing attention. For once. And that makes the hunters nervous.

vampire_142.title: The Smiling Guard
vampire_142.body: He does not back away. He signals to you. He knows. Or he is acting. Either way, it is dangerous.

vampire_143.title: The Sealed Cellar
vampire_143.body: Signs, tape, padlocks. Humans love closing doors. You love reopening them.

choices.C: Force your way in at night

vampire_144.title: The Pact of Silence
vampire_144.body: He is afraid and might talk. You have to choose which risk to take.

vampire_145.title: The Sacred Dust
vampire_145.body: This is not a direct attack. It is a test. Someone is measuring your reaction.

vampire_146.title: The Mandatory Banquet
vampire_146.body: A banquet grants power, but it also exposes your weaknesses.

vampire_147.title: The Fund Thief
vampire_147.body: Money does not smell like blood, but it does cause tears. And vampire tears are rare.

vampire_148.title: The Night Reporter
vampire_148.body: He loves dark stories. He is going to end up writing a real one. About you.

vampire_149.title: The Candle That Won't Go Out
vampire_149.body: The flame dances as if it is watching you. A watching flame is rarely a good sign.

vampire_150.title: The Growling Dog
vampire_150.body: One dog can alert an entire building. And humans wake up very fast when a dog panics.

vampire_151.title: The Pocket Mirror
vampire_151.body: In this mirror, you do not exist. Some find that amusing. You know it attracts curiosity.

vampire_152.title: The Knocking Door
vampire_152.body: Three knocks, always at the same hour. A routine is a threat when it comes from an enemy.

vampire_153.title: The Young One's Oath
vampire_153.body: He wants to do well. He wants to be useful. A vampire in too much of a hurry often makes a visible mistake.

vampire_154.title: The Strange Injection
vampire_154.body: Someone has a weapon that can hurt you. Not kill you, not yet. But make you doubt.

vampire_155.title: The Neighbors' Party
vampire_155.body: Music, laughter, broken glasses. And you have to slip beneath their feet like a nervous secret.

vampire_156.title: The Sound Beneath the Stone
vampire_156.body: Scratching, breathing, silence. The three stages of a growing problem.

vampire_157.title: The Corrupt Adviser
vampire_157.body: He figured out you have secrets. Humans grow brave when they smell money.

vampire_158.title: One Hunt Too Many
vampire_158.body: A territory with no humans is a tomb. You do not want to rule over an empty tomb.

vampire_159.title: The Forbidden Book Returns
vampire_159.body: Someone wanted you to read this. That is never a good sign.

vampire_160.title: The Cold Room
vampire_160.body: The cold is not normal. It bites the stone, kills the flame, and leaves the servants speechless.

vampire_161.title: The Requested Duel
vampire_161.body: He wants to challenge you in front of everyone. A duel always draws too many eyes.

choices.C: Turn the duel into a trial

vampire_162.title: The Media Bombshell
vampire_162.body: The red circle targets your face. You know the next red circle will target your lair.

vampire_163.title: The Doctor's Pact
vampire_163.body: He is not afraid. He wants a contract. Around here, contracts rarely end in court.

vampire_164.title: The Door with the Symbol
vampire_164.body: That symbol was not there yesterday. Someone got this far. Or something did.

vampire_165.title: The Fight at the Council
vampire_165.body: A chair flies, a cape tears, an elder insults a young vampire. Power shows itself when things fall apart.

choices.B: Let it happen and observe loyalties

vampire_166.title: The False Prophet
vampire_166.body: The more he talks, the more dangerous he becomes. Not directly for you, but for your discretion.

vampire_167.title: The Salt Trap
vampire_167.body: Simple, effective, humiliating. No one should trap a lord with salt. And yet.

choices.A: Disarm it and track the author

vampire_168.title: The Silver Powder
vampire_168.body: You cough, you step back, you get angry. And the enemy is counting on that anger to drag you out.

vampire_169.title: The Diplomatic Dinner
vampire_169.body: Dinners are traps in formal wear. But sometimes a trap reveals valuable information.

vampire_170.title: The Whisperer
vampire_170.body: She does not run. She whispers. And the shadows almost answer. That never happens for free.

vampire_171.title: The Evacuation Plan
vampire_171.body: An army without a plan flees badly. A clan without a plan panics fast. And panic leaves evidence.

vampire_172.title: The Collapsed Tunnel
vampire_172.body: The stones fall like teeth. And behind the stones, sometimes, things are waiting.

vampire_173.title: The Forbidden Chant
vampire_173.body: The chant reminds you of a time when the clan feared its own walls. And you do not like fear.

vampire_174.title: The Fang Collection
vampire_174.body: Fangs in a display case are grotesque. But if some of them are real, your clan has a leak.

choices.C: Watch him to trace the source

vampire_175.title: The False Alarm
vampire_175.body: The alarm wakes the nerves, not the vampires. But it brings humans, and that is worse.

choices.A: Shut off the alarm and investigate

vampire_176.title: The Identity Market
vampire_176.body: Identity is your mask. If someone sells your mask, they are selling your face too.

vampire_177.title: The Secret Banquet
vampire_177.body: They decorated, sang, prayed, and cooked. It starts with good intentions. It often ends in drama.

vampire_178.title: The Invisible Huntress
vampire_178.body: No sound, no smell, no witness. Someone very serious is playing against you.

vampire_179.title: The Suspicious Bottle
vampire_179.body: It is not your stock. So it is a provocation, a trap, or an attempt to frame you.

vampire_180.title: The Renovation Plan
vampire_180.body: Workers, lights, blueprints, schedules. Everything you cannot bite.

vampire_181.title: The Youth Pact
vampire_181.body: They want autonomy. You want order. Autonomy without order is ruin.

vampire_182.title: The Too Modern Suit
vampire_182.body: The suit looks good, but it makes you visible. You want to be respected, not noticed.

choices.C: Send someone else to wear it

vampire_183.title: The Locked Box
vampire_183.body: The box is heavy and silent. That silence feels like a threat.

vampire_184.title: The Broken Statue
vampire_184.body: The stone is broken without debris. An ancient presence seems to be waking up.

choices.C: Blame an enemy and strike back

vampire_185.title: Late Night Delivery
vampire_185.body: The courier vanished with your crate. The blood is gone too.

choices.C: Make do with the clan's stock

vampire_186.title: The Anti-Vampire App
vampire_186.body: An app promises to detect vampires. It targets you with a notification.

vampire_187.title: Ergonomic Coffin
vampire_187.body: An artisan offers you a comfort coffin. The clan wants to test it before you do.

choices.C: Refuse and keep the old one

vampire_188.title: Leak in the Crypt
vampire_188.body: Water is dripping onto the reserves. Even vampires hate mold.

vampire_189.title: Hunter with a Walkie-Talkie
vampire_189.body: You hear radios outside. Hunters are sweeping the neighborhood.

vampire_190.title: Improvised Secret Party
vampire_190.body: The secret throws a party in your honor. With posters and smoke effects.

vampire_191.title: Suspicious Bank
vampire_191.body: Your account is drawing attention. Too many nighttime purchases and too little sun.

vampire_192.title: The New Recruit Who's Too Motivated
vampire_192.body: A young vampire wants to hunt every night. He makes noise and posts stories.

choices.C: Put him in service of the secret

vampire_193.title: Clan Rationing
vampire_193.body: The clan wants a blood quota. Everyone accuses you of favoritism.

vampire_194.title: Curious Local Newspaper
vampire_194.body: A newspaper is investigating bite marks. They have the right area and the right date.

vampire_195.title: The Doctor Who Watches Too Closely
vampire_195.body: A doctor notices suspicious marks on several patients. He is putting it together.

vampire_196.title: The Secret's Empty Chest
vampire_196.body: The offering chest is empty. The secret is fighting and it is becoming public.

choices.A: Return the money and set them straight
choices.C: Ignore it and let it burn

vampire_197.title: The Neighbor Who Films
vampire_197.body: A neighbor installs a camera in the hallway. He calls it security.

vampire_198.title: The Garlic Perfume
vampire_198.body: A trend arrives. Everyone is wearing garlic pendants. Very stylish. Very annoying.

vampire_199.title: Power Outage
vampire_199.body: No power in the lair. Without alarms, everything becomes too easy for the hunters.

vampire_200.title: Plot Inside the Clan
vampire_200.body: Your niece wants to modernize coffin logistics. They are calling you the lord of the night.

vampire_201.title: Watered-Down Blood
vampire_201.body: A batch of blood is suspicious. The vampires are making faces, which is rare.

choices.C: Pass it off to the secret

vampire_202.title: Call from the Mayor
vampire_202.body: The mayor wants to meet you. He talks about night security and funding.

vampire_203.title: The Secret Gets Too Zealous
vampire_203.body: The secret wants to tattoo your symbol. On themselves. On everything. Even on the walls.

choices.B: Limit it to one discreet sign
choices.C: Use it to mark the territory

vampire_204.title: The Forbidden Book
vampire_204.body: A grimoire vanishes from the lair. And the last one to touch it is smiling too much.

vampire_205.title: Talkative Night Taxi
vampire_205.body: A driver says he had a passenger as cold as stone. Sounds like you.

vampire_206.title: Modern Masquerade Ball
vampire_206.body: A club is hosting a vampire ball. Too realistic. The hunters are going too.

vampire_207.title: Network Outage
vampire_207.body: No network in your area. The clan panics. The secret too. Bad sign.

vampire_208.title: Overly Curious Priest
vampire_208.body: A priest blesses the doors in your neighborhood. He watches you for too long.

choices.A: Draw him away from the area

vampire_209.title: The Itchy Outfit
vampire_209.body: Your ancient coat draws attention. Night fashion now demands something plain.

vampire_210.title: Blood on the Sidewalk
vampire_210.body: A bite scene was seen. Passersby took photos.

choices.A: Clean it up and erase it

vampire_211.title: Clan Assembly
vampire_211.body: The clan demands a meeting. Nobody likes meetings. But everyone likes complaining.

vampire_212.title: Offer of Protection
vampire_212.body: A human gang offers protection against hunters. They want a strange payment.

vampire_213.title: The Living Room Mirror
vampire_213.body: An antique mirror arrives at the lair. Everyone wants to see who still has a reflection.

vampire_214.title: The Private Clinic
vampire_214.body: A clinic offers very expensive blood. They want a partnership. Shady and practical.

vampire_215.title: Elegant New Rival
vampire_215.body: An unknown vampire arrives. He is polite. Too polite. It smells like ambition.

choices.C: Push him out of the territory

vampire_216.title: The Fan Donor
vampire_216.body: A human wants to donate blood. He asks for an autograph. On his neck.

vampire_217.title: The Elder's Potion
vampire_217.body: An elder offers a potion. He says it calms the thirst. Nobody believes him.

vampire_218.title: Hunt Too Visible
vampire_218.body: A hunt turned into a spectacle. Sirens. Videos. A full free show.

vampire_219.title: Health Inspection
vampire_219.body: A health inspection is coming near your caches. They are looking for illegal stock.

vampire_220.title: The Secret's Song
vampire_220.body: The secret writes a song about you. It gets stuck in your head. Even in immortals'.

choices.C: Turn it into a secret code

vampire_221.title: The Night Bar
vampire_221.body: A bar becomes your new hunting ground. But the owner asks too many questions.

vampire_222.title: The Forgotten Gloves
vampire_222.body: You left your gloves in the wrong place. They smell like crypt earth.

vampire_223.title: Duel of Elders
vampire_223.body: Two elders want a duel to settle everything. Even tonight's menu.

vampire_224.title: The Trapped Package
vampire_224.body: A package arrives at the lair. Too clean. Too neatly wrapped. Too suspicious.

vampire_225.title: The Barking Dog
vampire_225.body: A dog barks every time you pass by. Its owner is starting to write down the times.

vampire_226.title: The Sun Alarm
vampire_226.body: The lair has a sunlight alarm. It goes off in the middle of the night. Everyone panics.

vampire_227.title: The Secret's Outfit
vampire_227.body: The secret makes you an official outfit. It is far too shiny. And it attracts flashes.

vampire_228.title: Hunter Undercover
vampire_228.body: A new member of the secret asks questions that are way too precise. Feels like a fake fan.

vampire_229.title: The Streets Pact
vampire_229.body: Humans offer a pact. They give silence in exchange for protection. It is business.

vampire_230.title: The Scent of Rose
vampire_230.body: A perfume masks the smell of blood. The whole clan wears it. You cough. It is humiliating.

vampire_231.title: The List of the Missing
vampire_231.body: Two vampires are missing. The clan whispers. The hunters smile.

vampire_232.title: The Relic Market
vampire_232.body: An anti-vampire relic is being sold in town. Everyone wants it. Especially you.

vampire_233.title: The Clan Trial
vampire_233.body: A vampire is accused of betrayal. He demands a trial. The secret wants to attend.

choices.B: Grant forgiveness in exchange for service

vampire_234.title: The Warm Blood Scandal
vampire_234.body: Someone heated blood for the taste. The clan is splitting into gourmets and purists.

vampire_235.title: The Fog Mission
vampire_235.body: A strange fog covers the area. The hunters step inside. The clan hesitates.

vampire_236.title: The Anonymous Message
vampire_236.body: You receive a message. It knows your lair. It asks for a meeting.

vampire_237.title: The Secret Supply
vampire_237.body: A hidden blood reserve is discovered. It is not yours. So whose is it.

vampire_238.title: The Silence Pact
vampire_238.body: A journalist offers a deal. He stays quiet in exchange for an exclusive story. Very risky.

vampire_239.title: The Party Blood Drive
vampire_239.body: The secret organizes a blood drive. Too many people. Too many cameras. Too much temptation.

choices.C: Take the blood fast and leave

vampire_240.title: The Falling Mask
vampire_240.body: Someone from the clan was seen being careless. A face is spreading across social media.

vampire_241.title: The Council of Shadows
vampire_241.body: The clan demands an official council. They want votes. Even on your decisions.

vampire_242.title: The UV Trap
vampire_242.body: A UV lamp is found near the lair. Someone is testing the ground.

vampire_243.title: The Romantic Vampire
vampire_243.body: A vampire writes love letters to humans. He signs them with your name. Disaster.

choices.B: Set him straight and fix the damage

vampire_244.title: The Slashed Tires
vampire_244.body: The secret's vehicles are sabotaged. They blame the hunters. The clan blames the secret.

vampire_245.title: The Silver Rain
vampire_245.body: A huge amount of money falls into your hands. Too good. It looks like a financial trap.

vampire_246.title: The Misread Ritual
vampire_246.body: The secret misread a text. Now they are summoning things that pound on the walls.

vampire_247.title: The Freezing Stock
vampire_247.body: Part of the blood has frozen. The clan is yelling. You could yell too, but you have dignity.

choices.B: Throw it out and secure the rest

vampire_248.title: The Lantern Festival
vampire_248.body: A festival lights up the streets all night long. Zero shadows. Your territory becomes an aquarium.

vampire_249.title: A Hunter's Promise
vampire_249.body: A hunter offers a truce. He says he wants the true leader. He is aiming at you.

vampire_250.title: The Clan Wants Rules
vampire_250.body: The clan asks for a code of conduct. It sounds noble. It always ends in arguments.

choices.C: Refuse and decide case by case

vampire_251.title: The Fake Blood Trade
vampire_251.body: Humans are selling fake blood to young vampires. It makes them sick. And ridiculous.

choices.C: Leave it there to punish the naive

vampire_252.title: The Marked Door
vampire_252.body: A hunter symbol is painted on a nearby door. No one knows who saw it first.

vampire_253.title: The Fancy Invitation
vampire_253.body: You are invited to a private party. Too many mirrors. Too many eyes. Too many risks.

vampire_254.title: The Blood Pact
vampire_254.body: An elder proposes a blood pact to unite the clan. It works. It binds. It traps.

vampire_255.title: The Secret Wants Badges
vampire_255.body: The secret wants to give badges to the faithful. They also want your face on them.

vampire_256.title: The Human Cellar
vampire_256.body: A hidden cellar contains human reserves. Who did this. And why here.

choices.A: Free them and erase the evidence
choices.B: Use them and stay in control
choices.C: Hand them over to the hunters

vampire_257.title: Silence in the Lair
vampire_257.body: Everything is too quiet. Even the rats. Something has changed inside the walls.

vampire_258.title: The Emergency Supply
vampire_258.body: There is an emergency reserve. But no one has the key. And everyone is looking at you.

vampire_259.title: The Drone Hunt
vampire_259.body: Drones fly at night. They search for heat. Vampires do not give off heat, but they observe.

vampire_260.title: The Clan Wants a Symbol
vampire_260.body: The clan wants an official symbol. The secret suggests a giant crown. Absolutely not.

vampire_261.title: The Smell of Smoke
vampire_261.body: Smoke is seeping into the crypt. It comes from outside. And outside there are hunters.

vampire_262.title: The Clan Banquet
vampire_262.body: The clan wants a banquet. The secret wants to serve. Hunters love large tables.

choices.C: Set up a fake trap banquet

vampire_263.title: The Clan Against the Secret
vampire_263.body: The clan says the secret talks too much. The secret says the clan bites too much. Great atmosphere.

vampire_264.title: The Flower Delivery Man
vampire_264.body: A flower delivery man insists on coming inside. He says it is a surprise. You hate surprises.

vampire_265.title: The Rumor Epidemic
vampire_265.body: A rumor says you have a ridiculous weakness. The city laughs. The clan does too.

vampire_266.title: The Sewer Map
vampire_266.body: A sewer map is circulating. It shows access points to your lair. Someone snooped around.

vampire_267.title: The Fight Over Shares
vampire_267.body: The clan is fighting over blood distribution. It feels like a condo board meeting.

vampire_268.title: The Secret Wants a Slogan
vampire_268.body: The secret wants an official slogan. They suggest Long Live the Night. It lacks subtlety.

vampire_269.title: The Parking Guard
vampire_269.body: A guard watches too well. He knows the plates. He knows the schedules. He knows too much.

vampire_270.title: The Great Cold Arrives
vampire_270.body: The cold is coming. The streets are emptying. Hunting is getting harder. The hunters stay.

vampire_271.title: The Witness Returns
vampire_271.body: An old witness sees you again. He recognizes you. He smiles. That means trouble.

vampire_272.title: The Anti-Secret Group
vampire_272.body: A human group is fighting against the secret. They put up flyers. They are looking for a leader.

vampire_273.title: The Secret's Backup Plan
vampire_273.body: The secret has a backup plan in case you die. Very thoughtful. Very insulting.

choices.C: Use the plan to test loyalty

vampire_274.title: The Private Investigation
vampire_274.body: A private detective is digging around your neighborhood. He is not afraid. That is new.

choices.A: Pull him away from the case

vampire_275.title: The Final Pact of the Evening
vampire_275.body: The clan wants clear direction. The secret wants a sign. The hunters want your address.

vampire_276.title: The Night Florist
vampire_276.body: A florist opens at night below your lair. He sees too many pale faces.

vampire_277.title: The Fridge Message
vampire_277.body: The blood stock fridge plays a strange message. The clan swears it is talking to you.

vampire_278.title: The Moon on Sale
vampire_278.body: A brand is selling a drink called Full Moon. The secret already loves it.

vampire_279.title: The Broken Fang
vampire_279.body: A vampire from the clan breaks a fang during a hunt. He screams louder than his prey.

choices.C: Laugh about it in front of everyone

vampire_280.title: The Forgotten Tunnel
vampire_280.body: An old tunnel connects your lair to a hotel cellar. Tempting and unsettling.

vampire_281.title: The Loyal Delivery Man
vampire_281.body: A night delivery man never asks questions. That is exactly why it is suspicious.

vampire_282.title: The Damp Basement
vampire_282.body: The basement of the lair drips everywhere. Even the coffins are starting to complain.

vampire_283.title: The Neighbor Without Curtains
vampire_283.body: A neighbor never sleeps and watches the street. He collects details.

vampire_284.title: The Ball of Shadows
vampire_284.body: An elder wants a private ball. The clan wants to dance. You want to survive.

vampire_285.title: The Rooftop Drone
vampire_285.body: A drone circles above the lair every night. It smells like paid curiosity.

vampire_286.title: The Living Portrait
vampire_286.body: An old portrait changes expression when you walk past it.

vampire_287.title: The Cellar Strike
vampire_287.body: The stock guards refuse to move without more blood.

vampire_288.title: The Priest in Stories
vampire_288.body: A priest posts videos every night about the evil roaming near you.

vampire_289.title: The Red Lounge
vampire_289.body: A private club wants to rent you a secret room. The price is strange.

vampire_290.title: The Novice Who's Too Stylish
vampire_290.body: A novice arrives in a white suit. Very handsome. Very noticeable. Very annoying.

choices.B: Hand him over to the clan

vampire_291.title: The Black Market
vampire_291.body: A market sells anti-vampire items and souvenirs from your neighborhood.

vampire_292.title: Ash Over the City
vampire_292.body: A fine ash falls over the city. The clan sees it as a sign.

vampire_293.title: The Talkative Waiter
vampire_293.body: A waiter knows your night habits a little too well. He smiles when you lie.

vampire_294.title: The Closed Museum
vampire_294.body: A museum closes for renovation. A blood relic sleeps there without guards.

vampire_295.title: The Stuck Coffin
vampire_295.body: Your coffin refuses to close. Luxury has its limits.

vampire_296.title: The Staring Dog
vampire_296.body: The neighbor's dog growls every time you step out. It figured something out.

vampire_297.title: The Secret Lottery
vampire_297.body: The secret is organizing a lottery to fund your nights. The idea is awful and profitable.

vampire_298.title: The Taxi Without Reflection
vampire_298.body: A driver shows a photo from his rearview mirror. You are not in it.

vampire_299.title: Solar Perfume
vampire_299.body: A perfume promises the scent of sunlight. The clan wants to test it. Bad idea.

vampire_300.title: The Rented Crypt
vampire_300.body: Your old crypt is listed for rent online.

vampire_301.title: The Violin on the Platform
vampire_301.body: A musician plays every night beneath your windows. The clan is getting sentimental.

vampire_302.title: The Rusted Chest
vampire_302.body: A chest rises from a flooded cellar. It bears your old seal.

vampire_303.title: The Club Mirror
vampire_303.body: A club installs mirrors everywhere. Selfies become a trap.

vampire_304.title: The Cold Banquet
vampire_304.body: The clan complains about the temperature of the blood. Immortality breeds pettiness.

vampire_305.title: The Night Pastor
vampire_305.body: A pastor comes to bless the streets after midnight. His timing annoys you deeply.

vampire_306.title: The Velvet Lounge
vampire_306.body: A secret lounge welcomes people curious about the supernatural. Your name is already circulating there.

vampire_307.title: The Harbor Chill
vampire_307.body: Crates arrive at the harbor at night. The smell of blood drifts all the way to you.

vampire_308.title: The Attic Key
vampire_308.body: An old key appears in your coat. You did not put it there.

vampire_309.title: The Human Chef
vampire_309.body: A chef wants to make dishes for vampires. It is ridiculous and intriguing.

vampire_310.title: The Shadowless Room
vampire_310.body: One room in the lair has no shadows anymore. The secret finds it magnificent.

vampire_311.title: The Overly Calm Security Guard
vampire_311.body: The parking lot guard greets you by your first name. You never gave it to him.

vampire_312.title: The Stolen Painting
vampire_312.body: An old clan painting disappears. It is worth more as a symbol than as money.

vampire_313.title: The Heated Tunnel
vampire_313.body: A secret tunnel is getting too warm. Someone is digging near your walls.

vampire_314.title: The Red Sommelier
vampire_314.body: A sommelier offers a special list for immortals. Refined and dangerous.

vampire_315.title: The Neighbors' Night
vampire_315.body: The neighbors are throwing a street party. Lots of light. Way too much.

vampire_316.title: The Cracked Balcony
vampire_316.body: The lair's balcony is crumbling. Falling from there would be very public.

choices.C: Make the clan do the work

vampire_317.title: The Pale Notary
vampire_317.body: A notary already seems to know too much about your assets and your nights.

vampire_318.title: The Biting Graffiti
vampire_318.body: Your symbol appears on several walls. The secret is already applauding.

vampire_319.title: The Piano in the Hall
vampire_319.body: A piano starts playing by itself in the hall. Very classy. Very bad sign.

vampire_320.title: The Cellar Contract
vampire_320.body: A restaurant owner wants to rent your cellar without knowing who sleeps above it.

vampire_321.title: The Ancient Mask
vampire_321.body: A mask reappears in storage. It belonged to an old rival.

vampire_322.title: The Nervous Bouncer
vampire_322.body: A club bouncer recognizes several members of the clan. He starts taking notes.

vampire_323.title: The Rooftop Greenhouse
vampire_323.body: A greenhouse is growing on the next roof. Too much light. Too many eyes upstairs.

vampire_324.title: The Discreet Tailor
vampire_324.body: A tailor knows how to hide your hunting clothes. Useful or suspicious.

vampire_325.title: The Closed Platform
vampire_325.body: The secret subway platform is closed. Your routes are ruined.

vampire_326.title: The Unstamped Letter
vampire_326.body: A letter arrives without a stamp and without a trace. It mentions your first name.

vampire_327.title: The Sickroom Keeper
vampire_327.body: A human offers to feed the weakest members of the clan. He smiles too well.

vampire_328.title: The Tattoo Parlor
vampire_328.body: A tattoo artist is copying vampire symbols. The secret is already lining up.

vampire_329.title: Fire Under the Door
vampire_329.body: A glow slips under the crypt door. Inside, nobody moves.

vampire_330.title: The Clan's Physical Therapist
vampire_330.body: The clan discovers the aches of immortality. It is pathetic but real.

vampire_331.title: The Filmed Terrace
vampire_331.body: A terrace unknowingly records you every night. The angles are terrible.

vampire_332.title: The Basement Sermon
vampire_332.body: A human group gathers in a basement to hunt shadows.

choices.C: Send them on a false trail

vampire_333.title: The Missing Coat
vampire_333.body: Your old coat disappears from the wardrobe. Without it, you lose more than style.

vampire_334.title: The Smiling Concierge
vampire_334.body: The concierge tells you good night before you even open the door.

vampire_335.title: The Flower Cellar
vampire_335.body: White flowers are growing in one cellar of the lair. The clan hates it.

vampire_336.title: The Grand Inventory
vampire_336.body: The stock no longer matches the books. Someone is drinking off quota.

vampire_337.title: The Pirate Radio
vampire_337.body: A radio station is reading the names of hunters. Yours is not far down the list.

vampire_338.title: The Night Mailman
vampire_338.body: A mailman has been delivering after midnight for three nights. He does not look human.

vampire_339.title: The Black Display Window
vampire_339.body: A nearby display window turns opaque at night. Someone is hiding something.

vampire_340.title: The Engraved Word
vampire_340.body: A word is carved into the elevator. It wishes you a good awakening.

vampire_341.title: The Incense Seller
vampire_341.body: A seller perfumes the street every night. The clan coughs with dignity.

vampire_342.title: The Living Attic
vampire_342.body: The lair's attic seems to breathe at night. The clan refuses to go up there.

vampire_343.title: The Secret's Logo
vampire_343.body: The secret offers you a real logo. You are not sure you like progress.

vampire_344.title: The Dawn Bus
vampire_344.body: A bus passes too close to the lair. Its windows reflect everything.

vampire_345.title: The Jealous Mentor
vampire_345.body: An elder resents your authority. He is already building his own little circle.

vampire_346.title: The Night Garden
vampire_346.body: A garden is growing at the foot of the lair. Too much traffic too early in the morning.

vampire_347.title: The Key Market
vampire_347.body: Duplicate keys for the neighborhood are circulating. Bad news for your door.

vampire_348.title: The Mayor's Portrait
vampire_348.body: The mayor wants to pose at night in your neighborhood. He likes cameras too much.

vampire_349.title: The New Streetlamp
vampire_349.body: A bright white streetlamp lights up your entrance exactly. It feels personal.

choices.B: Ask for it to be removed

vampire_350.title: The Blood Chest
vampire_350.body: A refrigerated chest arrives without an order. Inside, too much blood and no name.

vampire_351.title: The Chamber of Chains
vampire_351.body: A sealed room contains ancient chains still pulled tight.

vampire_352.title: The Sweating Waiter
vampire_352.body: A bar waiter trembles when he sees you. He is going to talk eventually.

vampire_353.title: The Bridge of Shadows
vampire_353.body: Under an old bridge, fresh signs announce a hunt to come.

vampire_354.title: The Golden Lounge
vampire_354.body: The clan wants to redo the main room. Very chic. Very visible. Very expensive.

choices.C: Make the secret pay for it

vampire_355.title: The Cellar Notary
vampire_355.body: A shady notary offers to launder your inheritances. It reeks of a trap.

vampire_356.title: The Alley Under Construction
vampire_356.body: Your favorite alley has been opened up by workers. Your habits are worthless now.

vampire_357.title: The Neighbor's Piano
vampire_357.body: The neighbor plays at dawn and keeps you from sleeping. It is almost war.

vampire_358.title: The Debt Board
vampire_358.body: Someone posts the clan's debts in the hall. The atmosphere gets delicious.

vampire_359.title: The Glove Merchant
vampire_359.body: A merchant offers gloves that hide the coldness of your skin.

vampire_360.title: The Theater Cellar
vampire_360.body: A theater cellar smells like fresh blood. Someone is performing there before you.

vampire_361.title: The Anonymous Account
vampire_361.body: An online account is telling accurate details about your nights. Too accurate.

vampire_362.title: The New Code
vampire_362.body: The secret changes all its codes without telling you. Great stupid idea.

choices.C: Let it slide for one night

vampire_363.title: The Rose Market
vampire_363.body: A rose market opens at night. Very pretty. Very full of witnesses.

vampire_364.title: The Cold Corridor
vampire_364.body: One corridor in the lair suddenly freezes over. Even the walls seem to be waiting.

vampire_365.title: The Mayor's Driver
vampire_365.body: The mayor's driver recognizes you from an old photo. He is waiting for a price.

vampire_366.title: The Cape Trend
vampire_366.body: The secret brings back black capes. The hunters have never had this much work.

vampire_367.title: The Blocked Well
vampire_367.body: An old well in the lair is blocked by something heavy.

vampire_368.title: The Curious Florist
vampire_368.body: The florist is now selling white lilies to all your neighbors.

vampire_369.title: The Rival's Debt
vampire_369.body: A rival admits to a huge debt. The clan wants to see him fall.

choices.A: Help him at a high price

vampire_370.title: The Police Tape
vampire_370.body: Police tape blocks off a street useful to the clan. It smells like a wide trap.

vampire_371.title: The Doorman's Trunk
vampire_371.body: The doorman is hiding a trunk in his booth. Inside is your symbol.

vampire_372.title: The Silent Lounge
vampire_372.body: One room in the lair swallows all sound. The secret wants to make it a temple.

vampire_373.title: The Dawn Server
vampire_373.body: A coffee shop opens earlier than expected right across from the lair.

vampire_374.title: The Black Letter
vampire_374.body: A black-sealed letter announces your judgment. No name. No date.

vampire_375.title: The Laughter in the Cellar
vampire_375.body: Laughter rises from a locked cellar. You recognize a voice that should be dead.

vampire_376.title: The Wounded Florist
vampire_376.body: The night florist returns with one arm in a sling. He saw something.

vampire_377.title: The Neon Cellar
vampire_377.body: A nearby cellar glows red neon every night. The clan is worried.

vampire_378.title: The Subway Chest
vampire_378.body: A forgotten chest rests beneath the closed platform. It bears an ancient date.

vampire_379.title: The Hungry Novice
vampire_379.body: A novice refuses to wait for the clan's rules. He wants to go out now.

vampire_380.title: The Discreet Plumber
vampire_380.body: A plumber knows your underground levels a little too well. He works without asking questions.

vampire_381.title: The Priest in White
vampire_381.body: A priest in white blesses one of the neighborhood doors. That is no coincidence.

vampire_382.title: The Alarm Failure
vampire_382.body: The lair alarm shuts off by itself three times in one week.

vampire_383.title: The Windowless Bar
vampire_383.body: A bar without windows opens two blocks away. The secret already wants to go there.

vampire_384.title: The Mayor's File
vampire_384.body: A file on the mayor lands on your desk. It smells like a useful trap.

vampire_385.title: The Collapsed Cellar
vampire_385.body: A small cellar in the lair collapses. An old corridor appears underneath.

vampire_386.title: The Thursday Group
vampire_386.body: A human group gathers every Thursday near your place. They whisper too much.

vampire_387.title: The Insolent Tailor
vampire_387.body: The neighborhood tailor calls you prince in front of everyone.

vampire_388.title: The Found Phone
vampire_388.body: A forgotten phone contains pictures of the lair and the street across from it.

choices.C: Trap whoever comes back for it

vampire_389.title: The Silent Baron
vampire_389.body: An old baron returns to the lair. He no longer speaks, but everyone trembles.

choices.C: Push him to choose a side

vampire_390.title: The Flooded Corridor
vampire_390.body: A corridor is covered in black water. No one knows where it came from.

vampire_391.title: The Injured Bouncer
vampire_391.body: The bouncer you paid comes back with a split lip. He spoke to someone.

vampire_392.title: The Morning Market
vampire_392.body: A market sets up too early near the lair. Eyes arrive with the dawn.

vampire_393.title: The Rooftop Watcher
vampire_393.body: Someone climbs onto the next roof every night with binoculars.

vampire_394.title: The Melted Lock
vampire_394.body: The lock on a forbidden room has melted from the inside.

vampire_395.title: The Neighbor Who's Too Polite
vampire_395.body: A neighbor holds the door for you with a smile that is far too calm. He was waiting for you.

vampire_396.title: The Harbor Tunnel
vampire_396.body: A passage runs from the harbor up toward your neighborhood. It is recent.

vampire_397.title: The Charming Rival
vampire_397.body: A rival is making your clan laugh. That is bad for your authority.

vampire_398.title: The Nameless Box
vampire_398.body: A heavy box arrives without a name. Inside, something scratches softly.

vampire_399.title: The Deserted Platform
vampire_399.body: The secret platform has been empty for days. Even the rats are gone.

vampire_400.title: The Dawn Pact
vampire_400.body: The clan wants a promise. The secret wants a sign. Dawn is already getting close.
